types.name: GMS Rare Disease Virtual
types.description: This is a panel for the Genomic Medicine Service for an exome/genome/panel based test that requires a virtual gene panel for rare disease in the Test Directory.

types.name: GMS Rare Disease
types.description: This panel type is used for GMS panels that are not virtual (i.e. could be a wet lab test)

types.name: GMS signed-off
types.description: This panel has undergone review by a NHSE GMS disease specialist group and processes to be signed-off for use within the GMS.

publications: PMID:17526952 (Kanda et al., 2006) examine Japanese patients homozygous and heterozygous for the R450H mutation in the TSHR gene. Homozygous subjects displayed mild hypothyroidism/ Heterozygous patients also demonstrated hypothyroidism, but less severe than that of homozygous subjects.
PMID:14725684 (Park et al. 2004) suggest that heterozygosity for an inactivating TSHR mutation may be associated with compensated hypothyroidism and thyroid hypoplasia
16060907 (Camilot et al., 2005 report subclinical hypothyroid subjects with heterozygous substitutions
